name: QUnit
description: JavaScript unit testing framework originally built for jQuery, now a standalone tool used by Ember, jQuery and many other libraries.

seo.title: QUnit — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: QUnit: JavaScript unit testing framework originally built for jQuery, now a standalone tool used by Ember, jQuery and many other libraries.

when_to_use: JavaScript unit tests for jQuery and Ember projects
Browser-runnable tests without build tools required
Async test support with done callback and Promises
Standalone test runner with HTML reporter output

pros: Stable API trusted by jQuery and Ember
cons: Vitest and Jest dominate modern JS testing
review.verdict: Fine for Ember apps, otherwise new JavaScript projects should pick Vitest or Jest over QUnit.
review.best_for: Ember or legacy jQuery projects with QUnit already embedded
review.not_for: Modern JS or TypeScript projects where Vitest offers better DX
